name: anndata
tagline: Reference skill for the AnnData Python library used to store, read/write, and manipulate single-cell genomics matrices.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped documentation skill: no credential access, no network egress, no shell-piped remote code, and installs are pinned PyPI packages (anndata==0.12.16). Description gives clear positive and negative triggers pointing users to sibling skills (scanpy, scvi-tools, cellxgene-census). Bash is declared and only used for `uv pip install`, matching the

highlights.summary: Quick Start example data uses np.random.rand without a seed (lines 57, 114-115), so re-running the example produces different values each time; minor since it's illustrative dummy data, not a core ope
